payload.summary: Accept: the real DeepSeek repair satisfies the bounded invocation-receipt contract and all independent gates.
evidence_checked: correct, missing, and wrong protocol validator and CLI probes
flow, evidence, message, mailbox, and invocation validators
two-file repair scope and protected paths
four mode-600 runtime request and response artifact hashes
claims: Both paid DeepSeek calls are represented by structurally valid, hash-bound receipts.
The rejected first result remains preserved in mailbox history.
The accepted repair is independently verified and does not modify protected contracts.
requests: Close the iteration while retaining unsigned-receipt and append-only-storage risks.
payload.proof_boundary: Local hashes bind receipts to byte streams but do not cryptographically attest the remote provider, adapter exit status, or coordinator fidelity.
payload.skill_evolve: update: serialized protocol markers must be required, exact-matched, and tested at validator and CLI boundaries
